title: stachys vulnerabilis
intro: Stachys vulnerabilis, also known as Woundwort, is a plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Woundwort include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stachys vulnerabilis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
